emotional_tone: Scientifically authoritative, globally competitive, trustworthy, warm, environmentally conscious

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.services_grid: Bento Grid - Asymmetrical spanning, 1px subtle borders, solid backgrounds with hover lifts

buttons.primary: bg-primary_green text-white px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-emerald-900 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-primary_green text-primary_green px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary_green hover:text-white transition-colors

components.navigation: Sticky mega menu using Radix UI/Shadcn Navigation Menu, distinct active states
components.forms: Shadcn UI inputs with subtle borders, generous padding, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sage-green
components.carousels: Embla Carousel (via Shadcn) for Clients and Testimonials, auto-play enabled
components.stats_counter: Framer Motion intersection observer triggers, React CountUp for number animation

animations.page_load: Subtle fade up for hero text, scale-in for hero image
animations.scroll: Staggered fade-up for grid items (0.1s delay between items), image parallax effect on hero

iconography.style: Duotone, size 32px for sections, size 24px for ui elements, matching primary_green color

hero.description: High-end sustainable infrastructure and wind turbines

services_bg.description: Abstract solar panel background for technical sections

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette: Deep green (#064E3B) must be the grounding color, accented by earth tones. Do not use generic tailwind blue/indigo.
For headings, install and use Outfit via Google Fonts. For body, install IBM Plex Sans. Never use Inter for headings.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling globally. This is critical for the premium feel.
Hero sections MUST have an overlay gradient (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/70 via-black/40 to-transparent) to preserve text readability over complex images.
Use Phosphor icons. Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Bento grids for 'Services' and 'Industries' sections. Span grid items asymmetrically to create visual interest. Avoid basic 3-column equal layouts.
Ensure all interactive components and forms have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. Only use the URLs provided in this media section.
Add 'group' class to cards and use 'group-hover:translate-x-1' and similar micro-interactions on arrows or icons inside them.
Build the admin panel using standard Shadcn table/form components but style them densely (Control Room Grid approach).
